commands.review_summary:
This PR adds or rewrites inline comments and JSDoc across CLI, cron, outbound/channel, plugin SDK, ACP, LLM, markdown, normalization, shared helpers, and one utility test file, with no intended runtime behavior change.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is a comment/JSDoc maintainability pass, not a bug report with a runtime reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual maintainer review is needed because the PR has a protected maintainer label and current head conflicts with main; there is no narrow automated code defect to repair.

target.title: docs: continue inline comment pass
target.body:
## Summary

- Continues the inline-comment pass after #88554, rebased onto current `main`.
- Adds focused JSDoc/inline comments for CLI, cron, outbound channel, plugin SDK channel, shared text, utility, ACP core metadata, ACP runtime, ACP session store/type, ACP runtime adapter/error-format, shared text helper/sanitizer, shared utility, shared device auth, shared device pairing access, shared entry status, shared config/operator, LLM runtime/validation, normalization slug, markdown chunking, shared requirements, usage aggregate, thread binding lifecycle, chat content, chat envelope, shared frontmatter, node list, shared runtime helper, scoped expiring id cache, avatar policy, assistant identity/gateway bind, Tailscale status, subagent formatting, silent reply policy, and PID liveness contracts.
- Keeps comments out of file headers and import blocks, with no runtime behavior intended.

## Verification

- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- `pnpm test src/utils/utils-misc.test.ts`
- `pnpm test packages/acp-core/src/meta.test.ts packages/acp-core/src/session-lineage-meta.test.ts packages/acp-core/src/session-interaction-mode.test.ts packages/acp-core/src/session.test.ts`
- `pnpm test packages/acp-core/src/runtime/session-identifiers.test.ts packages/acp-core/src/runtime/error-text.test.ts packages/acp-core/src/runtime/errors.test.ts`
- `pnpm test packages/acp-core/src/session.test.ts packages/acp-core/src/runtime/session-identifiers.test.ts`

- `pnpm test packages/normalization-core/src/string-normalization.test.ts packages/normalization-core/src/string-coerce.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/shared/chat-content.test.ts src/shared/chat-message-content.test.ts src/gateway/agent-prompt.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/shared/chat-envelope.test.ts src/gateway/chat-sanitize.test.ts src/infra/session-cost-usage.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-session-usage.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/shared/frontmatter.test.ts src/skills/loading/frontmatter.test.ts src/hooks/frontmatter.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-subpaths.test.ts`
- `pnpm test src/shared/node-list-parse.test.ts src/shared/node-resolve.test.ts src/shared/node-match.test.ts`

- `pnpm test src/shared/pid-alive.test.ts src/infra/stale-lock-file.test.ts`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: comment-only follow-up after #88554 for CLI helpers, cron contracts, outbound channel helpers, plugin SDK channel contracts, shared text chunking, utility parser helpers, ACP core metadata/helper docs, ACP runtime identifier/error docs, ACP session store/type docs, ACP runtime adapter/error-format docs, shared text helper docs, shared text sanitizer docs, shared utility docs, shared device auth docs, shared device pairing access type docs, shared entry status docs, shared config/operator docs, LLM runtime/validation docs, normalization slug docs, markdown chunking docs, shared requirements docs, usage aggregate docs, thread binding lifecycle docs, chat content docs, chat envelope docs, shared frontmatter docs, node list docs, shared runtime helper docs, scoped expiring id cache docs, avatar policy docs, assistant identity/gateway bind docs, Tailscale status docs, subagent formatting docs, silent reply policy docs, and PID liveness docs.
Real environment tested: local source checkout.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`; `pnpm test src/utils/utils-misc.test.ts`; `pnpm test packages/acp-core/src/meta.test.ts packages/acp-core/src/session-lineage-meta.test.ts packages/acp-core/src/session-interaction-mode.test.ts packages/acp-core/src/session.test.ts`; `pnpm test packages/acp-core/src/runtime/errors.test.ts packages/acp-core/src/runtime/error-text.test.ts packages/acp-core/src/runtime/session-identifiers.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/text/join-segments.test.ts src/shared/text/tool-call-shaped-text.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/device-auth.test.ts src/shared/device-auth-store.test.ts src/shared/device-pairing-access.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/device-pairing-access.test.ts src/shared/device-bootstrap-profile.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/entry-status.test.ts src/shared/entry-metadata.test.ts src/shared/agent-run-status.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/config-eval.test.ts src/shared/operator-scope-compat.test.ts src/shared/model-param-b.test.ts`; `pnpm test packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts packages/llm-runtime/src/api-registry.test.ts packages/normalization-core/src/record-coerce.test.ts`; `pnpm test packages/normalization-core/src/string-normalization.test.ts packages/normalization-core/src/string-coerce.test.ts`; `pnpm test packages/markdown-core/src/render-aware-chunking.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/ir.chunking.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/requirements.test.ts src/shared/config-eval.test.ts src/shared/entry-status.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/usage-aggregates.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/usage.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/thread-binding-lifecycle.test.ts src/channels/thread-bindings-policy.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-subpaths.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/chat-content.test.ts src/shared/chat-message-content.test.ts src/gateway/agent-prompt.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/chat-envelope.test.ts src/gateway/chat-sanitize.test.ts src/infra/session-cost-usage.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-session-usage.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/frontmatter.test.ts src/skills/loading/frontmatter.test.ts src/hooks/frontmatter.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-subpaths.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/node-list-parse.test.ts src/shared/node-resolve.test.ts src/shared/node-match.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/global-singleton.test.ts src/shared/runtime-import.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/scoped-expiring-id-cache.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/avatar-policy.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/assistant-identity-values.test.ts src/shared/gateway-bind-url.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/tailscale-status.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/subagents-format.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/silent-reply-policy.test.ts src/config/silent-reply.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/shared/pid-alive.test.ts src/infra/stale-lock-file.test.ts`.
Evidence after fix: rebased branch `codex/inline-comments-followup-5` onto current `origin/main`; diff check passed; targeted utility tests passed locally (1 file / 13 tests); ACP core metadata helper tests passed locally (4 files / 30 tests); ACP runtime identifier/error tests passed locally (3 files / 19 tests); ACP session store/type tests passed locally (2 files / 14 tests); ACP runtime type/error-format tests passed locally (3 files / 19 tests); shared text helper tests passed locally (2 files / 18 tests); shared text sanitizer tests passed locally (4 files / 165 tests); shared utility tests passed locally (3 files / 21 tests); shared device auth tests passed locally (3 files / 15 tests); shared device pairing access/bootstrap tests passed locally (2 files / 8 tests); shared entry status tests passed locally (3 files / 21 tests); shared config/operator tests passed locally (3 files / 26 tests); LLM runtime/validation tests passed locally (3 files / 5 tests); normalization slug tests passed locally (2 files / 36 tests); markdown chunking tests passed locally (2 files / 5 tests); shared requirements tests passed locally (3 files / 26 tests); usage aggregate tests passed locally (2 files / 19 tests); thread binding lifecycle tests passed locally (3 files / 27 tests); chat content tests passed locally (4 files / 60 tests); chat envelope tests passed locally (4 files / 69 tests); shared frontmatter tests passed locally (4 files / 57 tests); node list tests passed locally (3 files / 17 tests); shared runtime helper tests passed locally (2 files / 12 tests); scoped expiring id cache tests passed locally (1 file / 3 tests); avatar policy tests passed locally (1 file / 6 tests); assistant identity/gateway bind tests passed locally (2 files / 8 tests); Tailscale status tests passed locally (1 file / 7 tests); subagent formatting tests passed locally (1 file / 5 tests); silent reply policy tests passed locally (2 files / 9 tests); PID liveness tests passed locally (2 files / 18 tests).
Observed result after fix: PR branch pushed for maintainer review with no uncommitted repo changes.
What was not tested: broader suites and runtime/UI smoke, because this slice only adds comments and focused utility/ACP/shared-text/device-auth/shared-config/LLM/normalization/markdown/requirements/usage-aggregate/thread-binding/chat-content/chat-envelope/frontmatter/node-list/runtime-helper/scoped-cache/avatar-policy/identity-bind/tailscale-status/subagent-format/silent-reply-policy/pid-liveness tests.
